# Demand Discovery Proof

## Goal

Prove that people are already searching, complaining, comparing, or paying around the problem.

## Evidence sources

- search queries,
- competitor ads,
- review sites,
- community threads,
- support forums,
- marketplace listings,
- job postings,
- integration searches,
- pricing-page traffic,
- direct customer language.

## Demand score

```text
demand_score =
problem_frequency
+ willingness_to_pay_signal
+ competitor_presence
+ urgency
+ search_intent
+ pain_specificity
```

## Next action

If demand score is low, run problem-discovery content and direct research before performance ads.
